plugins.name: checkmate
plugins.description: Draft and QA RFP compliance matrices in Spare's voice, with deterministic per-row precedent lookup built fresh from Spare's past-RFP corpus at the start of every fill. Pure-stdlib MCP server indexes the per-session corpus and returns TF-IDF-matched precedents for each new requirement. No shared file, no schedule, no stale caches. Forbids no-bid and scope-judgment outputs. Built for the Spare SE team to replace Responsive.
